message:
Node started: Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B1-constraint-first-planning-ceramic-sintering
Title: B1. Constraint-First Planning (Ceramic Sintering)

Question:
Which effect is unlikely to arise from coarsening gas evolution during ceramic sintering?

Answer choices: A-F.

Grading target:
Exact match on the single letter.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
